name: Calla Lilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs to a stiff froth in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add sugar and beat until smooth.
3. Mix together the flour and baking powder, then blend into the batter.
4. Add vanilla and continue beating for 2 minutes.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto a greased cookie sheet, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
6. Bake at 375-400°F (190-200°C) until set, about 5 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and shape each cookie while hot into a horn shape with the seam side down to cool.
8. To serve, fill each horn with whipped cream and add a sliver of candied orange peel in the center to resemble flower stamens.
Makes 8 calla lilies.
